description: Product Description Wisdom Step by Step 4+ Toothpaste Ingredients Sorbitol, Aqua, Hydrated Silica, Glycerin, Cellulose Gum, Aroma, Sodium Lauryl Sulfate, Sodium Fluoride, Sodium Saccharin, Mica, Sodium Hydroxide, Ci 77891, Ci 18965, Ci 42051, Contains: 0.298 percent W/W Sodium Fluoride (1350 Ppm F). Directions Use a pea-sized amount of toothpaste for children aged 3-6, and a smear for children under 3. Brush teeth for 2 minutes, twice a day, and spit out after brushing. Supervise children under 6 during brushing to minimize swallowing. Safety Warning For external use. Do not swallow. Keep out of reach of children. If irritated, stop using and consult a dentist. Box Contains 1 x Wisdom Step by Step 4+ Years Fluoride Toothpaste 75 ml Manufacturer Contact Information Wisdom Toothbrushes Ltd., Haverhill, England, CB9 8DT. See more
